language.restartMessage: Changing the language restarts the app to apply the new text direction.

help.title: Help & Support
help.description: Having trouble? Reach out to our support team and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.

privacy.title: Privacy & Security
privacy.description: Your data is encrypted and never shared with third parties without your consent. We follow industry-standard security practices to keep your account safe.
privacy.dataBody: Name, email, phone number, and address — only what's needed to provide the service.
privacy.useBody: Solely to match you with technicians and manage your bookings. We never sell your information.

notifications.title: Notification preferences
notifications.description: Control whether FixIt sends notifications to this device and whether they play sound or vibrate when they arrive.
notifications.notificationsDesc: Master switch for push notifications from FixIt.
notifications.soundDesc: Play the default alert sound for incoming notifications.
notifications.vibrationDesc: Vibrate this device when FixIt notifications arrive.

services.title: My services
services.subtitle: The services you currently offer to customers.
services.empty: You don't offer any services yet. Request one below to get started.
services.requestSubtitle: Tell us about a service you'd like to offer. Our team reviews every request.
services.submitSuccess: Request submitted — we'll review it and get back to you.
